generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical component controlling smart lighting systems including dimmers and occupancy-based activation, integrated with reinforcement learning policies from BOREALIS project"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control system component managing thermostats, dampers, and fans for environmental regulation with bidirectional communication capabilities"
]

instance ReinforcementLearningController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Adaptive controller implementing BOREALIS reinforcement learning algorithms for dynamic optimization of building automation systems"
]

instance EclipseHonoInterface : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Middleware interface enabling bidirectional communication between physical devices and Ditto runtime platform via standardized protocols"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor detecting human presence for space utilization analysis and adaptive control optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Multi-parameter sensor measuring temperature, humidity, and CO2 levels for environmental monitoring and comfort assessment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting condition sensor providing real-time data on illuminance levels for visual comfort optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data Transmitted
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalSensor
]

instance LightingDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model semantically enriched with device metadata including tenant IDs, endpoint addresses, and control logic policies"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoConfigurationGenerator
]

instance RuntimeDataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation output enabling real-time visualization and analytics in Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance SensorMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Automated extraction of sensor configurations from BIM models to ensure semantic alignment with virtual representations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Stream of post-occupancy sensor data used for iterative optimization of space utilization patterns"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningFramework
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous stream of temperature, humidity, and CO2 measurements for environmental monitoring and comfort assessment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance LightingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time illuminance data for visual comfort optimization and energy consumption analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningFramework
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMToolingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tools automating BIM semantics extraction and runtime artifact generation for Ditto configurations"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMToDittoTransformationService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Device management middleware providing bidirectional communication between physical devices and Ditto runtime platform"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceRegistrationService, DataIngestionService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runtime platform enabling service-oriented architecture for modular DT services with standardized extension points"
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeConfigurationService, ServiceExtensibilityService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization engine delivering immersive monitoring and control interfaces for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance DittoConfigurationGenerator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation engine generating Ditto runtime configurations from BIM semantics"
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeDeploymentService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Machine learning framework implementing adaptive control policies for dynamic building optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables BOREALISControlService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization service providing immersive monitoring of building operations through Unreal Engine"
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingPerformanceVisualization, OccupancyPatternInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based optimization service analyzing energy consumption, visual comfort, and health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, ComfortAssessmentInsight
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bidirectional synchronization service ensuring seamless integration of new sensors and actuators"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceIntegrationAction
]

instance ServiceExtensibilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular architecture service enabling integration of custom services via Ditto's extension points"
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomServiceIntegrationAction
]

instance RuntimeConfigurationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment service for control policies and sensor configurations without full redeployment"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptivePolicyAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingPerformanceVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of building operations including sensor data and control states"
]

instance OccupancyPatternInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of post-occupancy patterns for space utilization optimization"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics on lighting, HVAC, and occupancy patterns to reduce operational costs"
]

instance ComfortAssessmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effects assessment including circadian rhythm optimization from sensor data"
]

instance DeviceIntegrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated synchronization between BIM and physical devices for new sensor/actuator deployment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CustomServiceIntegrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic integration of new services like predictive maintenance or anomaly detection"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdaptivePolicyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Runtime adjustment of reinforcement learning control policies without system redeployment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical built environment containing academic buildings and Living Labs with embedded Building Control Systems"
    base:contains OccupancySensor, EnvironmentalSensor, LightingSensor,
                LightingActuator, HVACActuator, ReinforcementLearningController
]

// C5: Components
instance BIMModelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Core BIM model containing building geometry, component relationships, and semantic device metadata"
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructure
]

instance ControlSystemComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building Control System integrating sensors, actuators, and controllers for automated building operations"
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructure
]

instance VisualizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 plugin providing interactive 3D visualization of building operations"
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructure
]

instance DataIngestionComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware component handling real-time data ingestion from physical sensors"
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructure
]

// Relationships
instance BIMToDittoTransformationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation service converting BIM semantics to Ditto runtime configurations"
    DTDFVocab:provides DittoConfigurationAction
]

instance DeviceMetadataExtraction : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated extraction of sensor metadata from BIM models for Ditto configuration"
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorMetadataAction
]

instance BOREALISControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based control service implementing adaptive lighting and HVAC policies"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlAction
]

instance DittoConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of Ditto runtime configurations from BIM model semantics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SensorMetadataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated extraction and configuration of sensor metadata for Ditto platform"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdaptiveControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execution of reinforcement learning-based control policies for dynamic building optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeviceRegistrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono service managing device registration and management for bidirectional communication"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceRegistrationAction
]

instance DataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling real-time data ingestion from physical sensors to Ditto platform"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataIngestionAction
]

instance DeviceRegistrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Registration of physical devices with Ditto runtime platform"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataIngestionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Ingestion of sensor data streams from physical devices"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RuntimeDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating deployment of DT runtime artifacts from BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeDeploymentAction
]

instance RuntimeDeploymentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated deployment of Ditto configurations and runtime components"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 service providing real-time 3D visualization of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides InteractiveVisualizationAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Rendering of real-time building performance data in 3D environment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction involves **control signal generation** and execution by the DT to influence the physical system, achieved through:
  - **Automated generation of runtime interfaces** from BIM models, enabling the DT to send commands (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) to physical actuators.
  - **Bidirectional communication** via **Eclipse Ditto** and **Eclipse Hono**, which act as middleware to translate DT control signals into executable commands for the BCS.
  - **Reinforcement learning-based control policies** (e.g., adaptive lighting optimization in **BOREALIS**) dynamically adjusting physical system parameters based on virtual simulations.
  The framework supports **real-time feedback loops** where virtual decisions (e.g., energy optimization) are translated into physical actions with minimal latency."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale operates on **real-time and iterative learning cycles**. The DT synchronizes with physical systems at **millisecond-to-second intervals** for real-time monitoring and control (e.g., adaptive lighting adjustments). Additionally, the BOREALIS project employs **post-occupancy sensor data** for **iterative reinforcement learning**, refining control policies over longer timeframes (e.g., weeks or months) to optimize energy consumption and occupant comfort. The framework does not specify sub-second latency but emphasizes **real-time synchronization** for critical operational feedback."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular system** with the following components:
  - **BIM Core**: The semantic foundation for device modeling and DT deployment.
  - **Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Hono** (device management) and **Ditto** (runtime services) enable bidirectional communication.
  - **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** provides immersive 3D monitoring and interaction.
  - **Service Layer**: Custom services (e.g., energy optimization, predictive maintenance) integrate via **standardized extension points**.
  - **Control Layer**: Reinforcement learning and adaptive policies (e.g., **BOREALIS**) dynamically adjust physical system behavior.
  The constellation supports **scalable, interoperable DT deployment** by decoupling components via **modular interfaces** and **real-time data exchange**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **all life cycle stages** of the building, from **design to operation and refurbishment**:
  - **Design phase**: BIM models are enriched with **device semantics** (e.g., sensor/actuator configurations) for DT deployment.
  - **Construction phase**: Physical devices are commissioned and integrated into the DT via **automated middleware configuration** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto).
  - **Operation phase**: The DT provides **real-time monitoring, optimization, and control** (e.g., adaptive lighting, energy management).
  - **Refurbishment phase**: The DT supports **dynamic reconfiguration** of services and sensors without full redeployment, ensuring continuity of virtual representation.
  The DT covers **as-designed (ideal), as-manufactured, and as-operated** representations, with **semantic drift mitigation** via continuous synchronization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Semantic alignment**: BIM models are **formally enriched** with device metadata to prevent **semantic drift** during deployment.
  - **Real-time synchronization**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** ensure low-latency data exchange, minimizing discrepancies between PT and DT.
  - **Validation metrics**: The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE)** metric quantifies synchronization accuracy, assessing how closely the DT reflects the physical system.
  - **Uncertainty modeling**: Post-occupancy data (e.g., sensor noise, environmental variability) is incorporated into **reinforcement learning policies** to refine DT fidelity over time.
  - **Verification**: Automated checks validate **device configurations** and **control logic** before DT deployment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware** for technical connectivity, leveraging **bidirectional communication protocols** (e.g., RESTful APIs, message brokers) to synchronize data between physical sensors/actuators and the virtual twin. While specific protocols like **MQTT or OPC UA** are not explicitly mentioned, the text confirms reliance on **standardized middleware frameworks** for interoperability. Endpoints are configured via **tenant and device IDs** extracted from BIM models."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as **scalable, deployable artifacts** using **containerized environments** (e.g., Docker) for middleware components (Hono/Ditto). The visualization layer (Unreal Engine) may require **dedicated servers** for high-performance rendering, though the text does not specify cloud or on-premises hosting. The framework prioritizes **scalability** and **modular deployment** to accommodate growing infrastructure systems."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT framework supports **horizontal integration** through:
   - **Standardized extension points** for third-party services (e.g., IoT platforms, analytics tools).
   - **Interoperability with AECO-specific standards** (e.g., BIM, middleware APIs).
   - **Modular service architecture** enabling seamless communication with external systems (e.g., building management software).
   The text does not exclude specific protocols (e.g., OPC UA) but focuses on **open-source middleware** (Hono/Ditto) for broad compatibility."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to **AECO-specific standards** (e.g., BIM) and **middleware compliance** (e.g., Eclipse Ditto’s OMA LWM2M standards). While **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** or **BCF (BIM Collaboration Format)** are not explicitly mentioned, the **BIM backbone** ensures alignment with **industry best practices**. Standardization is primarily achieved through **modular, service-oriented design** and **semantic integration** with existing AECO workflows."
]
